film.title: Fifty Shades of Black
film.overview: An inexperienced college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

dialogues.dialogue: "Thank God I'm not you."  Kateesha! Oh, my God, we did it! Girl!  I'm so proud of you.  Who you telling? I was close, girl.  I was one hand job away from losing valedictorian to that b***h,
I'mma go punch a b***h in the throat.  Lindsey! You bilingual b***h!  So proud of you.  Hannah!  Dad!
Dad!  I'm so happy to see you.  Oh! I'm so proud of you.  You know, I thought you'd turn out not to be s**t.  But you ended up looking real good,
